/usr/lib/ccache/cc -std=c89 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/lex.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/pp.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/parse.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/type.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/gen.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/gen_x86.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/opt.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/pic.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/util.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/cc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/c99.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/c11.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/c23.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/ir.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/ir_print.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/ir_serialize.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/lto.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/dwarf.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/ext_builtins.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/ext_attrs.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/ext_asm.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/diag.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/opt_bb.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/opt_mem2reg.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/opt_sccp.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/opt_dce.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/opt_inline.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/regalloc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-cc.dir/src/cc/ir_codegen.c.o" -o free-cc
